objective: Advance the industry ETF research system to V1.6 by upgrading ETF mapping governance with manual ETF whitelists, blacklists, mapping evidence levels, review-required flags, review queues, compact Chinese outputs, and real-data validation.

acceptance_checks.description: Run V1.6 on real AkShare public data with compact outputs and refreshed history.
Audit V1.6 industry-to-ETF mapping quality, evidence levels, review flags, and excluded ETF types.
Audit that V1.6 validation uses the compact output layout.
acceptance_checks.command: python .\scripts\audit_compact_output_layout.py --output-dir .\outputs\industry_etf_research_validation --required-debug-files all_ranked_industries.csv raw_industry_panel.csv agent_results.json historical_feature_panel.csv rankic_report.csv group_return_report.csv topn_backtest.csv etf_mapping_audit.csv etf_mapping_review_queue.csv etf_mapping_coverage_summary.csv validation_decisions.csv current_portfolio.csv portfolio_summary.csv real_data_audit.json

acceptance_checks.description: Audit the industry ETF factor registry after V1.6 mapping governance additions.
Audit task brief governance after V1.6 migration.

decision_boundary: V1.6 remains research-only. ETF mapping governance can improve implementation quality but does not validate alpha. Historical validation still uses PIT price-derived features and forward labels; current valuation is only current-snapshot explanation until enough archived PIT valuation snapshots exist.
research_boundary: Research-only validation; no individual stocks, no trading signal, no order generation, no sample data, and no validated alpha promotion.
